Class CrossTableBatchGetBuilder

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.CrossTableBatchGetBuilder
public class CrossTableBatchGetBuilder extends Object
Builds a cross-table batch get operation to retrieve items from multiple tables by their keys.

Obtain via DynamoSimplifiedClient.batchGet(). Unlike the single-table BatchGetBuilder, this builder accepts table-scoped keys, allowing retrieval from multiple tables in a single request.

      public CrossTableBatchGetBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new CrossTableBatchGetBuilder.
      Parameters:
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client

  • Method Details

    • addKey

      public <T> @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKey(@NonNull Table<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition key from the given table.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed table to read from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKey

      public <T> @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKey(@NonNull Table<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Object sortKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition and sort key from the given table.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed table to read from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKeys

      public <T> @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKeys(@NonNull Table<T> table, @NonNull Collection<?> partitionKeys)
      Adds multiple partition keys from the given table at once.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed table to read from
      partitionKeys - the partition key values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • project

      public @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes for the most recently added entry to the specified attribute names.

      Projection is applied server-side, reducing data transfer and consumed capacity.

      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no entries have been added yet

    • project

      public @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> consumer)
      Restricts the returned attributes for the most recently added entry using a ProjectionExpression builder consumer.
      Parameters:
      consumer - a consumer to configure the projection expression
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no entries have been added yet

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Configures whether to return consumed capacity information for the operation.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the consumed capacity reporting level
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • consistentRead

      public @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetBuilder consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
      Configures whether to use strongly consistent reads for this batch get operation.

      If not set, DynamoDB defaults to eventually consistent reads.

      Parameters:
      consistentRead - true for strongly consistent reads
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull CrossTableBatchGetResult execute()
      Executes the batch get operation and returns items grouped by table.

      Groups entries by table name and calls the low-level DynamoDB API.

      Returns:
      a CrossTableBatchGetResult containing the retrieved items and unprocessed keys
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if more than 100 keys are provided
